title: De-mystifying PyTorch for ASICs at PyTorch Conference Europe 2026
description: Benchmark study across 1× H100 (RunPod), 8× H100 (Nebius), TPU v6e-8, and Trainium1 32xlarge, training image-recognition and text-generation models on each. Delivered at Station F, Paris, for the Linux Foundation.

title: MicroMARC: a 92%-accurate vision-language model
description: Visual-Qwen VLM that flags cognitively-degrading short-form video, fine-tuned on a 6,000-row multimodal dataset under a $376,000 Google Cloud compute grant.

title: Crafting the winning prompt of NAIPDC PH 2025
description: Model selection, chain-of-thought structure, XML scaffolding, and the guardrails behind the prompt that won the National AI Prompt Design Challenge PH.

title: GitHub Universe '25 recap at az:Repo Microsoft PH
description: Agentic Copilot, GPT-powered code review, and the GitHub Models platform, unpacked for the Microsoft Azure community in Manila.
